name: Spectrum Cat Care Malt Paste Sterilised 30g
shortDescription: Spectrum Cat Care Malt Paste for Cats It is formulated to support the needs of neutered kittens and adult cats. Supports immune, urinary, eye and heart health in cats. Supports skin and coat health with zinc and copper.
description: It is formulated to support the needs of neutered kittens and adult cats. Supports immune, urinary, eye and heart health in cats. Supports skin and coat health with zinc and copper. Key Benefits: Hairball Control : The malt paste helps to lubricate the digestive tract, aiding in the smooth passage of ingested hair through the system and preventing hairballs. Sterilized Formula : Specially formulated for sterilized cats to cater to their specific nutritional needs. Palatable : The paste has a tasty malt flavor, making it appealing to cats. Easy Administration : It can be given directly or mixed with food, ensuring ease of use for both cats and owners. 30g Tube : Convenient packaging for home use, with a practical size suitable for regular treatment. This product is ideal for cats prone to hairballs, particularly those that have been sterilized. It promotes smoother digestion and reduces discomfort associated with hairball formation. Inactive Ingredient Malt Extract (1.1.18) 52.5%, Oat Flour (1.4.9), Vegetable oil and fat (2.20.1), Yeast Products (12.1.12), Potassium Sorbate (E202), Deionized Water. Contains mannanoligosaccharide MOS and Beta Glucan. Nutrient Components Protein  5% Fat Content  27% Crude Fiber  1,1% Crude Ash  1,1% Moisture  13,7% Nutritional Recommendations and Warnings. Refer to the table for recommended daily amount of food (grams/day) that vary according to your cat’s age (months). The recommended daily amount of food may vary depending on the outdoor temperature, your cat’s living conditions (indoor/outdoor), character and activity In order for your cat to have/maintain the ideal weight, the amount of food to be given should be weighed. When adjusting the amount of food to be given, your cat’s appetite, appearance and stool analysis should be considered. Switching to a different food should be done gradually, by mixing small amounts of both (old and new) foods over the course of a week. Always keep clean and fresh water near the food bowl. Even if the water looks clean, change it at least once a day. Store the product in a dry and cool place and make sure that the package is well closed after each use. The recommended consumption date, batch code and factory approval number are on the package.
